# bft-progress-council-mcp

> BFT Progress Council MCP — 5-voter Byzantine council halts agentic loops when no real progress is happening. Stops tokens bleeding on infinite spins. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- start_session
- record_action
- council_vote
- get_session_summary
- estimate_tokens_saved
- list_voters

## Install
```
pip install bft-progress-council-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/bft-progress-council-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
